name: Node-RED (Bitcoin)
description: Wire together the Internet of Things
compose:
name: slashnode-node-red
services:
  web:
    image: nodered/node-red:5.0.0
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '1880'
      BITCOIN_NETWORK: $APP_BITCOIN_NETWORK
      BITCOIN_IP: $APP_BITCOIN_NODE_IP
      BITCOIN_RPC_PORT: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PORT
      BITCOIN_RPC_USER: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_USER
      BITCOIN_RPC_PASS: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PASS
      LND_IP: $APP_LIGHTNING_NODE_IP
      LND_GRPC_PORT: $APP_LIGHTNING_NODE_GRPC_PORT
      ELECTRUM_IP: $APP_ELECTRS_NODE_IP
      ELECTRUM_PORT: $APP_ELECTRS_NODE_PORT
    volumes:
      - web_data:/data
      - ${APP_LIGHTNING_NODE_DATA_DIR}:/lnd:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:1880:1880
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-node-red_web_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (node-red). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://nodered.org. Default login — user: "umbrel", password: "moneyprintergobrrr". ⚠️ SECURITY: ships a default password ("moneyprintergobrrr") — must be changed on first login.
